parquet_lost_update.demonstrates: Raw Parquet: no conflict detection → last-writer-wins → silent data loss

delta_conflict.demonstrates: Delta Lake OCC: ConcurrentAppendException prevents concurrent overwrite
delta_conflict.note: Inconclusive — delta-spark not installed; install delta-spark to run live

delta_snapshot.time_travel_query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM delta.`<path>` VERSION AS OF 0
delta_snapshot.demonstrates: Delta MVCC: VERSION AS OF 0 returns pre-write snapshot; concurrent readers unaffected
delta_snapshot.note: Inconclusive — delta-spark not installed; install delta-spark to run live

proof.conclusion: Parquet lost-update confirmed (500K rows silently lost); Delta OCC/MVCC require delta-spark to run live
proof.maps_to: CMU 15-721 Lectures 13-15: OCC / MVCC / Concurrency Control

validation.lecture: CMU 15-721 Lectures 13-15: OCC / MVCC / Concurrency Control
validation.concept: OCC detects write-write conflicts at commit time; MVCC enables consistent snapshot reads
validation.proof: Parquet: 500,000 rows silently lost (last-writer-wins) | Delta OCC: inconclusive (delta-spark not installed) | Delta MVCC: inconclusive (delta-spark not installed)
validation.validates: ACID lakehouse (Delta) vs raw file format (Parquet) — integrity is not free
validation.interpretation: Raw Parquet has NO conflict detection: Writer B silently overwrote Writer A, losing 500,000 rows with zero error. Delta Lake sub-tests are inconclusive in this environment — delta-spark is not installed. Install delta-spark to observe ConcurrentAppendException (OCC) and VERSION AS OF 0 time-travel (MVCC) live.
